title: Authors and Citation
text: Francis Windram. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Windram F (2026). rsts: R Slay Spire Interface. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/fwimp/rsts.
code: @Manual{,   title = {rsts: R Slay The Spire Interface},   author = {Francis Windram},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/fwimp/rsts}, }

title: R Slay The Spire Interface
text: rsts provides interface performing Slay Spire run analysis using R.

title: R Slay The Spire Interface
text: can install development version rsts like :

title: R Slay The Spire Interface
text: load run data, can run load_sts_history() function. windows, automatically load runs, however another platform troubles can specify path load manually. Note: provide explicit path, also set id= argument steam community ID (.e. 17-character number, usually starting 7). help working “” multiplayer runs. Filters can applied using filter_ methods: can also chained:
code: library(rsts) myruns <- load_sts_history() library(rsts) myruns <- load_sts_history("path/to/runhistory", id=76561198000000000) length(myruns) #> [1] 18 justwins <- myruns$filter_outcome("Win") length(justwins) #> [1] 4 ironcladwins <- myruns$filter_outcome("Win")$filter_character("Ironclad", onlyowner = TRUE) length(ironcladwins) #> [1] 1

title: R Slay The Spire Interface

title: A Slay the Spire 2 player, mid-run (R6). — STS2PlayerMidrun
text: floor STS2Floor object midrun object refers . player STS2Player object midrun object refers . current_gold Current gold. current_hp Current health. damage_taken Damage taken floor. gold_gained Gold gained. gold_lost Gold lost. gold_spent Gold spent. gold_stolen Gold stolen (damn gremlins). hp_healed Health recovered floor. max_hp Max health. max_hp_gained Max health gained floor. max_hp_lost Max health lost floor. player_id id player within run data. ancient_choice choices available ancient (picked). bought_colorless colorless cards bought floor. bought_potions potions bought floor. bought_relics relics bought floor. card_choices card choices available. cards_enchanted cards enchanted floor. cards_gained cards gained floor. cards_removed cards removed floor. cards_transformed cards transformed floor. completed_quests quests completed floor. event_choices choices made event (particularly useful form). potion_choices potion choices available. potion_discarded potions discarded floor. potion_used potions used floor. relic_choices choices available floor (picked). relics_removed relics removed floor. rest_site_choices rest site choices (picked). upgraded_cards cards upgraded floor.

title: Slay the Spire 2 run (R6). — STS2Run
text: acts vector acts player encountered. ascension ascension level run. build_id build game run generated . game_mode game mode player playing. killed_by_encounter encounter killed player. killed_by_event event killed player. map list storing play--play run. STS2Map object. modifiers modifiers player turned . platform_type platform game (e.g. steam). players list player information. list STS2Player objects. run_time run duration (seconds). schema_version run schema version. seed seed run. start_time start time (seconds unix epoch, UTC). was_abandoned Whether player abandoned run. win Whether player won run. ownerid steam ID run owner.

text: path path installation. id Steam ID data want retrieve. NULL, just get first ID directory path = NULL. profilenum profile retrieve data (NULL retrieve ). game game retrieve run data (2 = STS2, 1 = STS), currently STS2 implemented. platform platform running ? players analyse runs number players (NULL , default). .returnraw Return raw JSON runs (mostly debugging).

title: Retrieve the most-taken cards across a history of runs. — topcards
text: runhistory STS2RunHistory object, filtered necessary. n number results retrieve, NULL retrieve . char character/s filter (NULL return ). return_unique Return 1 entry per unique card run. gives metric "runs card deck". ignore_basics consider basic cards (strike/defend).

text: data.frame cards number times appeared run

what: Calculate (and potentially plot) winrates by character. — winrate
title: Calculate (and potentially plot) winrates by character. — winrate
text: Calculate (potentially plot) winrates character.

title: Calculate (and potentially plot) winrates by character. — winrate
code: winrate(   runhistory,   plotit = TRUE,   relative = FALSE,   expected = NULL,   ignoreabandoned = FALSE,   ci = TRUE,   samples = 200,   lower_quant = 0.025,   upper_quant = 0.975 )

title: Calculate (and potentially plot) winrates by character. — winrate
text: runhistory STS2RunHistory object, filtered necessary. plotit Whether plot data just return summary data.frame relative Whether calculate character-based winrate relative total winrate. expected set, expected winrate scale values relative (automatically turns relative set). ignoreabandoned Remove abandoned runs data prior analysis (otherwise abandoned runs count losses). ci Whether calculate plot 95% confidence intervals samples number iterations use generating CIs. lower_quant lower quantile CIs. upper_quant upper quantile CIs.

title: Calculate (and potentially plot) winrates by character. — winrate
text: data.frame summary winrates character.
